gene_region.label: SHANK3 transcribed interval
gene_region.definition: Canonical SHANK3 genomic interval on GRCh37 / hg19 from Ensembl GRCh37 lookup, aligned to the hg19 coordinate system used by this app.

promoter_review_region.label: Operational promoter review window
promoter_review_region.definition: A practical 1 kb upstream window used by this app to flag promoter-adjacent coverage before the canonical gene interval begins.

promoter_hotspot_region.label: Promoter-associated CpG review window
promoter_hotspot_region.definition: Promoter-proximal CpG-focused span represented by the bundled EPIC subset and used here as the main methylation-review hotspot.

gene_context.gene_summary: SHANK3 encodes a postsynaptic density scaffold protein important for excitatory synapse organization. This topic bundle emphasizes neurological and neurodegenerative biology, with interpretation centered on synaptic signaling, neurotransmission, protein aggregation, neuronal survival, neurodevelopment, and neurodegeneration biology.
gene_context.clinical_context: The local SHANK3 bundle is oriented toward neurological and neurodegenerative biology. Use it for pathway triage, phenotype review, and candidate-gene context; external variant classification is required before clinical interpretation.
variant_effect_overview: SHANK3 variants can alter, tag, or contextualize synaptic signaling, neurotransmission, protein aggregation, neuronal survival, neurodevelopment, and neurodegeneration biology.
Effect direction depends on exact allele class, dosage, tissue, ancestry, phenotype definition, and assay context.
condition_research_overview: Neurological, neurodevelopmental, and neurodegenerative disease context
Synaptic signaling, excitability, neurotransmitter, and protein-homeostasis biology
Cognitive, movement-disorder, epilepsy, and psychiatric association review
gene_context.methylation_interpretation: SHANK3 methylation should be treated as local regulatory context around a synaptic signaling, neurotransmission, protein aggregation, neuronal survival, neurodevelopment, and neurodegeneration biology gene. Promoter-proximal methylation can support expression-potential review, but it should not replace genotype, RNA, protein, or phenotype data.
methylation_effects: Promoter or first-exon methylation may suggest a more restrained or permissive local expression state for SHANK3.
Because SHANK3 biology is tissue and pathway dependent, methylation values are context rather than a stand-alone biomarker.

Combined sequence plus methylation findings are most useful when interpreted against synaptic signaling, neurotransmission, protein aggregation, neuronal survival, neurodevelopment, and neurodegeneration biology.
methylation_condition_research: Epigenetic regulation studies that use SHANK3 promoter or gene-body methylation as expression-context evidence.
Variant-plus-methylation review for synaptic signaling, neurotransmission, protein aggregation, neuronal survival, neurodevelopment, and neurodegeneration biology.
Neurological, neurodevelopmental, and neurodegenerative disease context
Synaptic signaling, excitability, neurotransmitter, and protein-homeostasis biology

evidence.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000251322: SHANK3 coordinate source

biorender_visuals.label: SHANK3 biochemical figure starter
biorender_visuals.focus: SHANK3: neurological and neurodegenerative biology via synaptic signaling, neurotransmission, protein aggregation, neuronal survival, neurodevelopment, and neurodegeneration biology
biorender_visuals.template_title: Microglial Activation and Neurodegeneration Linked to Aging and Inflammation
biorender_visuals.usage_note: BioRender template and icon-library search results are bundled as figure starters. Open the template link in BioRender, then add or replace the listed icons to make a gene-specific biochemical pathway image.

gene_context.concrete_variant_prediction: The variant observed in this sample suggests a SHANK3 neurological and neurodegenerative biology thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to synaptic signaling, neurotransmission, protein aggregation, neuronal survival, neurodevelopment, and neurodegeneration biology. Treat the result as candidate pathway evidence until exact allele, zygosity, phenotype, and external classification are reviewed.

variant_records.common_name: SHANK3 neurological and neurodegenerative biology pathway model
variant_records.clinical_interpretation: SHANK3 neurobiology variation model is curated as a SHANK3 marker for Neurological, neurodevelopmental, and neurodegenerative disease context, Synaptic signaling, excitability, neurotransmitter, and protein-homeostasis biology. Read it through genotype dosage, phenotype context, and the synaptic signaling, neurotransmission, protein aggregation, neuronal survival, neurodevelopment, and neurodegeneration biology pathway rather than as a stand-alone deterministic result.

functional_effects: Can modify or tag synaptic signaling, neurotransmission, protein aggregation, neuronal survival, neurodevelopment, and neurodegeneration biology.
